data.body: src/lib/agent-session-runtime.ts currently exposes an onResult callback (line 103) that only fires when the normalized event has literal type === 'result' (line 204). This is payload-dependent and transport-dependent: Claude stream-json emits {type:'result'}, but Codex/jsonrpc emits {type:'turn.completed'} (see codex-jsonrpc-session.ts:411), Gemini ACP emits different shapes, OpenCode HTTP emits others. The result: onResult literally cannot fire for Codex. User asserted this was 'definitely 100% fixed' but the bug is still on main. Rename onResult → onTurnEnded and make firing a per-transport responsibility: each adapter (stdio normalizer, jsonrpcSession, acpSession, httpSession) emits a 'turn_ended' signal whenever it observes the end-of-turn for its protocol. The session runtime wires these into onTurnEnded regardless of JSON shape. Backward compat is NOT needed — this is a rename across internal callers.
data.title: Rename onResult to onTurnEnded and make it payload-agnostic
